description_long: This doll features a rounded, yellow base with a smooth, matte finish, supporting a cream-colored body that extends upward and tapers at the back. The head is topped with a black, pointed cap or hairpiece, which covers the upper portion and adds a stylized, cartoonish flair. One side of the face is dominated by a large, circular white eye with a black outline, while the other side is partially obscured by a sweeping lock of cream-colored hair. The doll's design is minimalist, with no visible limbs or detailed facial features aside from the single eye. The overall appearance is playful and abstract, making it suitable as a decorative toy in urban environments such as parks or playgrounds.
description: A stylized doll with a yellow base, cream body, and a black pointed cap, featuring a single large eye and sweeping hair. Its minimalist, cartoonish design is playful and abstract.
description_view_0: Front view shows the large white eye, black cap, and sweeping cream hair covering part of the face.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the smooth, rounded body and the way the hair curves downward, partially hiding the face.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the black cap and the cream body tapering down, with the yellow base visible at the bottom.
description_view_3: Back view highlights the pointed black cap and the elongated, tapering cream body, with no facial features visible.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll does not appear to wear any distinct clothing; its body is a smooth, cream-colored form with a yellow base, and a black cap or hairpiece, giving it a stylized, minimalist look.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright position with no visible limbs; the head is slightly tilted, and the body tapers downward.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with a single large, round eye and no visible mouth or eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short, smooth, cream-colored hair with a sweeping lock covering part of the face, topped by a black, pointed cap or stylized hairpiece.
